---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when I want to build a house but I can't place blocks yet..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. (e.g., "Add raycasting to the player camera so clicking places a Dirt block.")

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.
